description: CompositionWhite round neck, half sleeve t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest print FittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub Unleash your wild side with this 'Stallion lee' t-shirt. The combination of metallic silver and Prussian blue on the chest adds a stylish twist to this T-shirt, while the cotton fabric keeps you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Pair it with jeans or chinos and stylish footwear from the wide international collection available at myntra for that extra zing to your style mantra.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
